title: Work & School
shortSummary: Talk about your job, your studies, and daily working life in Mandarin.
culturalNote: Education is highly valued in China, and the high school exam, the 高考 (gāokǎo), is one of the most important moments in a young person's life. In the workplace, relationships and respect for seniority matter, and modesty about your own achievements is seen as good manners. Exchanging a name card with both hands is a small but appreciated courtesy.

grammar.rule: 在 + place + verb for where you work
grammar.explanation: To say where you work or study, use 在 (zài) plus the place before the verb: 我在银行工作 (I work at a bank), 我在大学学习 (I study at university).
grammar.commonMistake: Putting the workplace after the verb: it is 在银行工作, not 工作在银行.

grammar.explanation: State your profession with 是 plus the job, no measure word needed: 我是医生 (I am a doctor), 他是工程师 (he is an engineer).
grammar.commonMistake: Adding 个 unnecessarily. 我是医生 needs no measure word.

dialogue.setup: At a gathering, Nora and Wei get to know each other and talk about work.

lines.speaker: 伟
lines.chinese: 我在一家公司做工程师。你呢？
lines.pinyin: Wǒ zài yì jiā gōngsī zuò gōngchéngshī. Nǐ ne?
lines.english: I'm an engineer at a company. And you?

lines.speaker: Nora
lines.pinyin: Wǒ hái zài dúshū, xuéxí yīxué.

quiz.question: How do you ask 'What work do you do?'
quiz.explanation: 你 + 做 (do) + 什么工作 (what work).

quiz.question: 我_____银行工作。 (at)
quiz.explanation: 在 marks the workplace before the verb.

quiz.question: Which is correct for 'I am a teacher'?
quiz.explanation: 是 links you to the profession, no measure word.

quiz.question: Arrange: 工作 / 公司 / 在 / 我
quiz.explanation: 我 + 在公司 (at the company) + 工作 (work).
